docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PAXTON, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($10 SERVICE FEE) SERVED JAN-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINLAN, ELIZABETH IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APT'S.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-16-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BRENDAN QUINLAN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ELIZABETH QUINLAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($10 SERVICE FEE) SERVED JAN-31-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APARTMENTS
PROOF SERVICE BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APARTMENTS QUINLAN, ELIZABETH IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APT'S.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAXTON, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APARTMENTS QUINLAN, ELIZABETH IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APT'S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
